name: C-4 audit entries chain via prev_hash from sha256 hash of the previous canonicalized line per the Merkle chain contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e1 --actor a --data '{}' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event e2 --actor a --data '{}' && node -e 'const lines=require("fs").readFileSync(".claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl","utf8").split("\n").filter(Boolean);const e1=JSON.parse(lines[0]);const e2=JSON.parse(lines[1]);process.exit(e1.prev_hash==="GENESIS"&&e2.prev_hash.startsWith("sha256:")?0:1)' && echo chained 1>&2
